prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: SON-ASRO-METALDETECTKIT-19PC-BUN
Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR
Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor
Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 19pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit with Unique Musette Treasure Finds Bag
Description: Whether you’re searching for small bits of history or cash value items like gold coins, jewelry or precious metals, set yourself up for success in the field with ASR Outdoors 18pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit.
</br></br>
The kit includes the following metal detector accessories: 
</br></br>
x1 Musette style shoulder bag; x1 3 in 1 shovel with pick; x1 pair of gloves; x1 depth marker trowel; x1 10X eye loupe; x1 carabiner clip; x6 resealable plastic zip lock bags; x1 waterproof notebook; x1 serrated edge digger; x1 scoop with probe; x1 large sand scoop and x1 pair of tweezers
</br></br>
The best part about this metal detector accessories field kit, is that all included tools fit into the included musette style tool bag, making it easy to tote tools to and from the field, while keeping them together and organized in one location. 
</br></br>
Featuring a large, main compartment for raw materials collection, there are a total of 13 interior pockets to keep tools organized; a specialty zipper opening tool flap pocket found on the front of the bag, allows for quick access to notepads, maps, pens and pencils, personal belongings and more. In addition, the tool bag also features a built in exterior side loop, specifically designed to hold a standard handheld pinpointer, giving you quick and easy access in the field when needed.
</br></br>
Also worth noting, is the 2 in 1 metal detecting shovel; the durable ABS plastic scoop measures 14 inches in length and features a built in steel probe for finding and collecting valuables in sand and dirt. The steel probe unscrews from inside the top of the handle, and can conveniently be reattached to the end of the scoop, so both tools can be used simultaneously. 
</br></br>
Whether you’re a seasoned metal detecting hobbyist or brand new to the sport, the ASR Outdoor 18pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit is suitable for all levels and will have you covered in the field from start to finish.
Search Terms: Metal detector for adults gold prospecting equipment gold silver coins jewelry hobby metal detecting shovel accessories tools bag scoop pinpointer treasure outdoor gear birthday gifts for men husband boyfriend brother probe coin collection supplies
Features:
- METAL DETECTOR ACCESSORIES: Kit includes (1) Musette style treasure bag; (1) 3 in 1 shovel with pick; (1) pair of gloves; (1) depth marker trowel; (1) waterproof notebook with pencil; (1) serrated edge digger; (1) scoop with probe; (1) large sand scoop and assorted collection tools
- UNIQUE TOOL BAG: Featuring a large, main compartment for raw materials collection, there are 13 total interior pockets to keep tools organized; a side opening specialty tool flap found on the front of the bag allows for quick to notepads, diagrams or maps, as well as built in exterior pinpointer side loop
- METAL DETECTING SHOVEL: 2 in 1 metal detecting shovel means less tools in the field; scoop measures 14 inches and features a built in steel probe for finding and collecting valuables in sand and dirt; probe unscrews from inside the top of the handle and can be reattached to the end of the scoop so both tools can be used simultaneously
- NO SPACE WASTED: All metal detector accessories included with this ASR Outdoor kit fit into the included musette style tool bag, making it easy to tote tools to and from the field, while keeping them together and organized in one secure location
- SPECIFICATIONS: Kit Dimensions: 15 x 12 x 6.5 inches; Kit Weight: 6.20lbs

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 19pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit with Bag

tokens.name: Metal Detector Accessories Kit with Bag

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 19-Pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: Musette Shoulder Bag, 2-In-1 Shovel With Probe, 13 Interior Pockets, Digger, Sand Scoop, Tweezers

openai.title_differentiation: 13 Interior Pockets, Musette Tool Bag, 2-In-1 Shovel And Probe, Sand Scoop, Waterproof Notebook, Pinpointer Loop
